'''âch-d-l-zh''' ('''kachadlezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:timeline|timeline]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:timeline|timeline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-d-l-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kachadlezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadlezhoko|thichadlezhoko]] || [[word:jichadlezhoko|jichadlezhoko]] || [[word:shichadlezhoko|shichadlezhoko]] || [[word:kichadlezhoko|kichadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadlezhoko|thuthuchadlezhoko]] || [[word:jujuchadlezhoko|jujuchadlezhoko]] || [[word:shushuchadlezhoko|shushuchadlezhoko]] || [[word:kukuchadlezhoko|kukuchadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchadlezhoko|thuchadlezhoko]] || [[word:juchadlezhoko|juchadlezhoko]] || [[word:shuchadlezhoko|shuchadlezhoko]] || [[word:kuchadlezhoko|kuchadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchadlezhoko|thuchadlezhoko]] || [[word:juchadlezhoko|juchadlezhoko]] || [[word:shuchadlezhoko|shuchadlezhoko]] || [[word:kuchadlezhoko|kuchadlezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadlezhoko|thochadlezhoko]] || [[word:jochadlezhoko|jochadlezhoko]] || [[word:shochadlezhoko|shochadlezhoko]] || [[word:kochadlezhoko|kochadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadlezhoko|thochadlezhoko]] || [[word:jochadlezhoko|jochadlezhoko]] || [[word:shochadlezhoko|shochadlezhoko]] || [[word:kochadlezhoko|kochadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchadlezhoko|thĂŠchadlezhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠchadlezhoko|jĂŠchadlezhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠchadlezhoko|shĂŠchadlezhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠchadlezhoko|kĂŠchadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachadlezhoko|thathachadlezhoko]] || [[word:jajachadlezhoko|jajachadlezhoko]] || [[word:shashachadlezhoko|shashachadlezhoko]] || [[word:kakachadlezhoko|kakachadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachadlezhoko|thachadlezhoko]] || [[word:jachadlezhoko|jachadlezhoko]] || [[word:shachadlezhoko|shachadlezhoko]] || [[word:kachadlezhoko|kachadlezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachadlezhoko|thachadlezhoko]] || [[word:jachadlezhoko|jachadlezhoko]] || [[word:shachadlezhoko|shachadlezhoko]] || [[word:kachadlezhoko|kachadlezhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachadlezhithi|shachadlezhithi]] || [[word:shachadlezhiji|shachadlezhiji]] || [[word:shachadlezhishi|shachadlezhishi]] || [[word:shachadlezhiki|shachadlezhiki]]
